bar.headline: the four #185 bars; ALL must hold or H1 is falsified (recorded null, no adoption)

h1_requires_all.b_cost: mean per-cell cost_P <= 0.7 * cost_C (same-run; framer amortized /3)
h1_requires_all.c_outcome_spread: per-scenario max-min of rep full fraction-met, averaged: P <= C

bar.mde: at 3 reps / 8 clusters: half-widths ~0.09 full, ~0.17 hard pair — the 0.05 margin is inside the noise band; weak/strong language pre-committed
bar.judge_policy: dual-judge (opus pipeline + grok-4.5 re-grade); bars evaluated on opus; judge disagreement on a bar => bar NOT MET; never averaged (ADR 0057 d2)

cost.note: A and C are armd's MEASURED per-cell means (../2026-07-13-pdca-decide-armd/results.json, same config + scenarios; the pilot does not re-price them); P from this dir's B1 pilot (framer amortized); runtime backstop halts resumable over ceiling

herding_audit: mechanical: round-2 fire rate, toward-mean share, per-advisor |delta| (aggregate_poker.py) + hard-pair transcript sampling
